/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/pdcp_tx_benchmark.dir/pdcp_tx_benchmark.cpp.o -o pdcp_tx_benchmark  ../../../lib/pdcp/libocudu_pdcp.a ../../../lib/security/libocudu_security.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmbedcrypto.so ../../../lib/rohc/libocudu_rohc.a ../../../lib/instrumentation/libocudu_instrumentation.a ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
